Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes R1 Concepts website for current brake part products, promotions, pricing, and featured categories.

Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces high-quality, varied marketing content daily without requiring a copywriter, saving hours of creative work and preventing subscriber fatigue from repetitive messaging.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Creates the marketing email in HubSpot, assigns it to the appropriate contact list, and triggers the send via the Marketing Email API.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes Dynamic Friction Company website for current product lines, featured parts, pricing, and active promotions.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls new and open support tickets from HubSpot, including ticket description, customer details, order history, and conversation thread.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI-assigned classification and attaches the drafted reply as a note for the support agent to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all ticket intelligence centralized in HubSpot so the support team can approve and send responses directly from their existing workflow without switching tools.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer form submissions containing customer return reasons, issue descriptions, order details, and contact information from HubSpot.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Centralizes scattered customer issue data from Amazon packaging inserts into a single extraction point, ensuring no submission is missed or left unanalyzed.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs extracted form submissions into a structured Google Sheet with categorized columns for trend analysis, filtering, and team review.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Provides the team with a live, sortable dashboard of customer issues that reveals recurring product or fulfillment problems, enabling data-driven improvements to reduce return rates.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals such as website visits, page views, and engagement events on the R1 Concepts website.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using target keywords to identify content creators, influencers, and relevant social profiles across multiple platforms.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantities, on-order ETAs, and in-transit shipment details.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Consolidates what previously required a dozen people doing independent lookups into a single automated data pull, saving hours of collective labor each week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the backorder report with live status data, flags dead-end parts that have no available source or supplier, and prioritizes items by urgency.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Immediately highlights parts with no resolution path so the team can focus attention where it matters instead of wasting time on parts that are readily available.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications with personalized order status updates, ETA estimates, and alternative suggestions for dead-end parts.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces manual email drafting for each backordered customer, enabling proactive communication that improves customer satisfaction and reduces inbound inquiries.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract two-piece rotor listings with make, model, year fitment, and part specifications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Automates the tedious process of manually browsing three separate competitor catalogs, capturing comprehensive market coverage data in minutes instead of days.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor rotor data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlapping coverage and market gaps.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly where DFC already competes and where new product opportunities exist, giving Dino a clear roadmap for catalog expansion decisions.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data and purchase interest for two-piece rotor applications identified in the gap analysis.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Validates market demand before committing to new product development, ensuring DFC invests in parts customers actually want to buy.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Provides Dino with a unified, actionable document combining competitor intelligence, internal coverage, and real customer demand — ready for product planning decisions.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad campaigns across Meta and TikTok, extracting every piece of ad copy including headlines, descriptions, and call-to-action text.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides complete visibility across all running ad copy in seconds, eliminating the need to manually click through dozens of campaigns and ad sets on multiple platforms.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches the extracted ad copy for specific flagged phrases, identifies exact matches, and records the precise field and full copy context where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Catches compliance risks, outdated claims, or unauthorized language across hundreds of ads instantly — preventing costly policy violations or brand inconsistencies.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted flagged-list report via email showing every phrase match, the ad it appeared in, and the specific copy field where the match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable audit report on demand, enabling the team to fix problematic ad copy immediately before it triggers platform penalties or customer confusion.

summary: Here's this week's update on our AI automation pipeline. We're tracking **53 total agents** — **24 completed**, **9 in progress**, and **20 planned**. This week we added four new agents to the pipeline: the **Cerritos Building Sublet Agent**, a daily lead-gen tool finding local businesses for the Midway Place sublet; **R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI**, which will analyze and optimize Amazon ad campaigns across both brands; **R1 Video Clipper**; and **Paid Channel Chat Bot**. On the progress front, **Agent Tracker Agent V2** moved to Completed, giving us a polished new version of our weekly pipeline reporting. Momentum continues to build — stay tuned for more updates next week!
